village.name: Village
village.description: Medium-sized village, built next to a small and calm river at the foot of the mountains. It's surrounded by many fields, most of them infested by huge rats. Other than that, there's nothing interesting around

activities.starting_text: Work on the fields
Go for a run around the village
Try to carry some bags of grain
Swim in the river
Try to keep your balance on rocks in the river
Sit down and meditate
Go on a patrol around the village.
Gather wood on the outskirts
Dredge up some sand from the riverbed
Try fishing in the river

shack.name: Shack
shack.description: This small shack was the only spare building in the village. It's surprisingly tidy

eastern-mill.name: Eastern mill
eastern-mill.description: Local mill, run by a young duo. It's somewhat tidy, with occasional flour dust in corners

infested-field.name: Infested field
infested-field.description: Field infested with wolf rats. You can see the grain stalks move as these creatures scurry around

nearby-cave.name: Nearby cave
nearby-cave.description: A big cave at the base of a steep mountain, near the village. There are old storage sheds outside and signs of mining inside. Groups of fluorescent mushrooms cover the walls, providing a dim light. You can hear sounds of wolf rats from the nearby room

connected_locations.name: Suspicious wall
connected_locations.custom_text: Try to break the suspicious wall

activities.starting_text: Try lifting some of the rocks
Attempt climbing the mountain walls outside
Sit down and meditate in front of the gate
Mine the strange looking iron vein
Mine the deeper iron vein
Mine the atratan vein

cave-room.name: Cave room
cave-room.description: It's full of rats. At least the glowing mushrooms provide some light

cave-depths.name: Cave depths
cave-depths.description: It's dark. And full of rats

hidden-tunnel.name: Hidden tunnel
hidden-tunnel.description: There is, in fact, even more rats here

pitch-black-tunnel.name: Pitch black tunnel
pitch-black-tunnel.description: There is no light here. Only rats

mysterious-gate.name: Mysterious gate
mysterious-gate.description: It's dark. And full of rats.

mysterious-depths.name: Mysterious depths
mysterious-depths.description:
You find yourself in a large chamber with smooth walls and vaulted ceiling. The floor is covered in square tiles in the center, yet you cannot help but notice that all these squares make a circle, in some impossible to understand way.
There's another gate on the wall in front of you, but you have a strange feeling that you won't be able to open it with brute strength.

connected_locations.name: Nearby cave
connected_locations.custom_text: Climb back up to the main level of [Nearby cave]

forest-road.name: Forest road
forest-road.description: Old trodden road leading through a dark forest, the only path connecting the village to the town. You can hear some animals from the surrounding woods

connected_locations.name: Forest
connected_locations.custom_text: Leave the safe path and walk into the [Forest]

connected_locations.name: Forest clearing
connected_locations.custom_text: Go towards the [Forest clearing] in the north

connected_locations.name: Forest den traversal
connected_locations.custom_text: Try to get to the other side of the [Forest den]

activities.starting_text: Go for a run through the forest
Gather wood from nearby trees
Gather wood from sturdy trees
Gather useful herbs throughout the forest

forest.name: Forest
forest.description: Forest surrounding the village, a dangerous place

deep-forest.name: Deep forest
deep-forest.description: Deeper part of the forest, a dangerous place

forest-clearing.name: Forest clearing
forest-clearing.description: A surprisingly big clearing hidden in the northern part of the forest, covered with very tall grass and filled with a mass of wild boars

forest-den.name: Forest den
forest-den.description: A relatively large cave in the depths of the forest, filled with hordes of direwolves

bears-den.name: Bears' den
bears-den.description: A dark, smelly cave in the heart of the forest, with massive bones spread around the entrance

forest-lake.name: Forest lake
forest-lake.description: Far away from civilization, the forest opens up to an unspoiled lake. Nestled between a small cliff where it receives water from a rocky waterfall, and a dense canopy leading to what must be the forest's heart, it serves as a respite for the local animals - and now, yourself

activities.starting_text: Go diving in the lake waters
Try to keep your balance on top of the waterfall as water rushes around your feet
Mine the the shiny underwater vein
Try fishing in the lake

forest-ant-nest.name: Red ant nest
forest-ant-nest.description: A labyrinthine nest of red ants

town-outskirts.name: Town outskirts
town-outskirts.description: The town is surrounded by a tall stone wall. The only gate seems to be closed, with a lone guard outside. You can see farms to the north and slums to the south

activities.starting_text: Search for useful herbs by the roadside

slums.name: Slums
slums.description: A wild settlement next to city walls, filled with decaying buildings, poverty, and violent criminals

town-farms.name: Town farms
town-farms.description: Semi-private farms under jurisdiction of the city council. Full of life and sounds of heavy work

activities.starting_text: Work on the fields
Take care of local sheep in exchange for some wool

red-ant-nest-1.name: Red ant nest
red-ant-nest-1.description: A labyrinthine nest of red ants

red-ant-nest-2.name: Red ant nest
red-ant-nest-2.description: A labyrinthine nest of red ants

red-ant-nest-3.name: Red ant nest
red-ant-nest-3.description: A labyrinthine nest of red ants

gang-hideout.name: Gang hideout
gang-hideout.description: Hideout of a local gang. Old building with a labirynth of narrow corridors

town-square.name: Town square
town-square.description: The town's center of life, connected to all the markets, guilds, and other important places

cat-caf.name: Cat café
cat-caf.description:
A cat café in the center of town. There are multiple kitties of all kinds, but two females especially catch your eyes
 - a chubby mackerel tabby with a white belly and neck, and a slender tortoishell that seems blind on the right eye. There's a single worker in the café, a person of ambiguous gender with with long ponytail and glasses.

mountain-path.name: Mountain path
mountain-path.description: A treacherous path high above the village

activities.starting_text: Stupidly risk your life by trying to balance on some stones on the very edge of the cliff

small-flat-area-in-mountains.name: Small flat area in mountains
small-flat-area-in-mountains.description: A piece of flatland somewhere in the mountains, very high above the village. It's not that big, but more than enough for a camp

mountain-camp.name: Mountain camp
mountain-camp.description: A nice safe camp with a crackling fire and a rainproof tent, created by you to be a perfect base for further exploration

activities.starting_text: Search for useful herbs on the mountainside
Stupidly risk your life by trying to balance on some stones on the very edge of the cliff
Take a lesson from the goats and try to climb a wall near the camp

gentle-mountain-slope.name: Gentle mountain slope
gentle-mountain-slope.description: A surprisingly gentle clearing, with a herd of angry goats protecting it

downstream-from-the-village.name: Downstream from the village
downstream-from-the-village.description: The chittering clicks of crabs tell you that you're headed in the right direction. As you make your way closer to the riverbank's shore, you stumble across what you think at first is a boulder the size of a small building blocking your path. That is, until you notice it start to move...

connected_locations.name: Village
connected_locations.custom_text: Make the long hike back to the [Village]

riverbank.name: Riverbank
riverbank.description: You manage to deal a wounding crack to the giant crab's shell, driving it into a rage as it flees through the forest. With a moment of peace, you take stock of your surroundings. And if the amount of crabs on the river's shore are any indication, this might be the enormous crab nest you had heard about. You can't even tell where the shore meets the riverbank with the amount of crabs around here. The giant crab's trail is easy to spot, but it's just not possible to follow it without getting attacked by the smaller crabs. You will likely nead to get through  multiple groups of them on your way

connected_locations.name: Village
connected_locations.custom_text: Make the long hike back to the [Village]

activities.starting_text: Harvest flax from around the riverbank

riverbank-shore.name: Riverbank shore
riverbank-shore.description: As your eyes scan the shoreline, you see nothing but crabs across the horizon
riverbank-shore.leave_text: Climb off the beach and back to safety

further-downstream.name: Further downstream
further-downstream.description: While it wasn't hard to spot the giant crab's trail, following after it proved to be a different story. You made your way through the thick forest bush until the woods gave way to a moderately large lake overlooking a great basin, where you finally spotted the crab in a frenzy at it's nest. You consider going back and telling the guards, but by the time they'd arrive, the crab might have chosen a new nesting ground -- and you decide you have to end it now. Despite the cracks you've caused in it's shell, it seems more dangerous than when you fought it earlier, and the loose sand is only going to make this fight harder...

connected_locations.name: Riverbank
connected_locations.custom_text: Go back along the path you've made to the [Riverbank]

lake-beach.name: Lake beach
lake-beach.description: The winding river lead to a peaceful lake on the edge of the forest overlooking a great basin. The surface of the lake ripples from the current of the river feeding into it. Animals occasionally come up and lap at the edge of the lake before running back off into the woods. On the far end, the lake feeds into a waterfall

connected_locations.name: Riverbank
connected_locations.custom_text: Go back along the path you've made to the [Riverbank]

activities.starting_text: Swim against the current
Dig for clams around the lake beach
Practice rappelling down the cliff face
Sled pull a boulder
Run along the shore

waterfall-basin.name: Waterfall basin
waterfall-basin.description: The waterfall at the bottom of the lake. Large crabs almost indistinguishable from the stone inhabit the shore and nearby rock shelters. You consider that the cool rushing waters from overhead might be an good way to train your body to endure tougher situations

connected_locations.name: Lake beach
connected_locations.custom_text: Climb up the cliffside and return to the [Lake beach]

connected_locations.name: Swampland fields
connected_locations.custom_text: Crawl through the muck and brush to the [Swampland fields]

activities.starting_text: Harden your resolve by sitting underneath the waterfall
Sit in the rock shelter behind the waterfall and focus your mind

crab-spawning-grounds.name: Crab spawning grounds
crab-spawning-grounds.description: First an enormous crab nest, then an enormous crab's nest, and now this??

swampland-fields.name: Swampland fields
swampland-fields.description: A disgusting boggy marsh lies before you. Most of the ground, or at least what you can make out through the reeds, is covered in filthy water halfway up to your knees, and what isn't submerged has rotted into compost or is the nest of some unknown creature. You think you see something out of the corner of your eye, but as you turn to look, all you catch is a ripple in the reeds

connected_locations.name: Waterfall basin
connected_locations.custom_text: Crawl through the muck and brush and return to the [Waterfall basin]

the-swamplands.name: The swamplands
the-swamplands.description: The swamplands are hot, wet, and smell of rot. Water impedes your every movement, and vicious predators lie beneath it's surface
the-swamplands.leave_text: Slink away to some higher, dryer ground

swampland-tribe.name: Swampland tribe
swampland-tribe.description: Very small fortified settlement, built on a stretch of dry, stable ground. There are a few small huts and a single building built into the back of the encampment. As small as the settlement is, the fortifications surrounding it suggest that it once was larger

connected_locations.name: Swampland fields
connected_locations.custom_text: Leave the safety of the settlement and return to the [Swampland fields]

activities.starting_text: Forage for wild herbs and vegetables in the swamplands

longhouse.name: Longhouse
longhouse.description: A communal building that members of the settlement rest, eat, and recover in. The only other person in here right now is a wounded young woman, lying in a cot next to the door. The air smells faintly of rot and you can't help but notice there's far more cots than needed

connected_locations.name: Swampland tribe
connected_locations.custom_text: Go back out to the [Swampland tribe]

sparring-with-the-village-guard-heavy.name: Sparring with the village guard (heavy)
sparring-with-the-village-guard-heavy.description: She's showing you a technique that makes her attacks slow but deadly

sparring-with-the-village-guard-quick.name: Sparring with the village guard (quick)
sparring-with-the-village-guard-quick.description: She's showing you a technique that makes her attacks fast but weaker

suspicious-wall.name: Suspicious wall
suspicious-wall.description: It can be broken with enough force, you can feel it

fight-off-the-assailant.name: Fight off the assailant
fight-off-the-assailant.description: He attacked you out of nowhere

fight-the-angry-mountain-goat.name: Fight the angry mountain goat
fight-the-angry-mountain-goat.leave_text: Run away and hope it won't follow

fight-the-giant-crab.name: Fight the giant crab
fight-the-giant-crab.description: The village elder told you to be cautious...

fight-the-giant-crab-again.name: Fight the giant crab again!
fight-the-giant-crab-again.description: This time, you can't let it get away

forest-den-traversal.name: Forest den traversal
forest-den-traversal.description: A relatively large cave in the depths of the forest, filled with hordes of direwolves. You are trying to find out what's on the other side.

messages: You reach a wall of water and push through
